hero.badge: TikTok lyric video generator — vertical, AI-powered, free to export
hero.h1: TikTok Lyric Video Generator — Vertical Lyrics That Stay Readable
hero.subhead: Upload your song or paste a link. AI transcribes the lyrics and syncs every line to the beat. Preview in a vertical 9:16 frame with TikTok safe zones, then export — free, no subscription needed. One render works for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.

howItWorks.title: How the TikTok Lyric Video Generator Works

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, or FLAC — or paste a link. No account needed to start. The TikTok lyric video generator works from audio, so you do not need to type a single lyric line. Pick the 15-to-30-second section that will stop the scroll, or use the full track.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs every line
steps.description: Lyrics are transcribed automatically from the audio and synced to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. The TikTok lyric video maker positions text inside the vertical safe zone so your words are never buried under TikTok's like, comment, and share buttons.

steps.title: Preview vertically and export in 9:16
steps.description: Watch the draft on a phone-sized canvas before you post. Confirm the first lyric lands within 2 seconds, text is large enough for a 6-inch screen, and nothing is hidden by TikTok UI. Export in 9:16 HD — the same file works on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

whyChoose.title: Why Make TikTok Lyric Videos on LyricVideoMaker
whyChoose.description: Most lyric video tools are built for YouTube — horizontal, full-length, desktop-first. LyricVideoMaker is the TikTok lyric video generator built for vertical, short-form, phone-first content from the start.

highlight.title: Vertical-first, not vertical-as-an-afterthought
highlight.description: Every preview, every text layout, and every export is designed around a 9:16 phone screen with TikTok safe zones. You are not cropping a horizontal video — you are building a vertical one from scratch.

cards.title: Phone-screen lyric sizing
cards.description: Lyrics are sized for a vertical phone feed, not squeezed down from a widescreen lyric video. The result stays readable when someone watches with one thumb on the screen.

cards.title: TikTok safe zones built in
cards.description: Lyrics are automatically positioned away from the like, comment, share buttons, and caption area. No more guessing whether your text will be readable after posting.

cards.title: Short-form pacing by default
cards.description: The first lyric appears fast, hook clips stay tight, and endings feel loop-friendly. The page is built for TikTok behavior instead of full-song playback only.

items.question: How long should a TikTok lyric video be?
items.answer: 15 to 30 seconds performs best. Pick the hook, chorus, or the lyric people would repeat after hearing it once, and set start and end points before exporting.

items.question: How to add song lyrics to TikTok video without typing them?
items.answer: Upload your audio to this TikTok lyric video generator. The AI transcribes and syncs every lyric line automatically — no manual typing needed, in 50+ languages.

items.question: Will the lyrics avoid TikTok's buttons and captions?
items.answer: Yes. All TikTok exports keep lyrics inside the safe zone, away from the like, comment, and share buttons and the caption area.

items.question: Can I post the same video to Reels and Shorts?
items.answer: Yes. The 9:16 export works on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. One render, three platforms.

items.question: Is this TikTok lyric video maker free?
items.answer: Yes. Sign up, get free credits, and export your TikTok lyric video — no subscription required and no credit card required.

items.question: Can I use TikTok lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes. Your TikTok lyric videos are yours, including monetized and brand accounts. Just make sure you have the rights to the music you upload.
